  • Uses of Outbox in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer

    Classes in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer that implement Outbox
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    MeteredOutbox
    Decorator that adds Micrometer instrumentation to every publish and publishAll call without changing the contract of the underlying Outbox.
    Constructors in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer with parameters of type Outbox
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    MeteredOutbox(Outbox delegate, MeterRegistry registry)
    Creates a new metering decorator around delegate with the default pass-through tag policy.
     
    MeteredOutbox(Outbox delegate, MeterRegistry registry, BiPredicate<String,String> tagValuePredicate, String tagFallback)
    Creates a new metering decorator around delegate with a custom tag-cardinality policy.

  • Uses of Outbox in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel

    Classes in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel that implement Outbox
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    TracedOutbox
    Decorator that wraps every publish and publishAll call in an OpenTelemetry span using the messaging.* semantic conventions, and injects the active trace context into the event's headers so downstream consumers (relay / CDC / broker) can create a linked CONSUMER span from the event alone.
    Constructors in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel with parameters of type Outbox
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    TracedOutbox(Outbox delegate, OpenTelemetry otel)
    Convenience constructor that builds a Tracer from otel pinned to the outbox-otel instrumentation scope ("io.github.lobofoltran.outbox") and to this library's published version (read from Package.getImplementationVersion(), falling back to "unknown" when the JAR is exploded on the classpath without a manifest — typically only the case in IDE / reactor builds).
     
    TracedOutbox(Outbox delegate, Tracer tracer)
    Wraps delegate so every publish call emits a span on the supplied Tracer and propagates trace context via the W3C traceparent / tracestate headers.
     
    TracedOutbox(Outbox delegate, Tracer tracer, io.opentelemetry.context.propagation.TextMapPropagator propagator)
    Wraps delegate so every publish call emits a span on the supplied Tracer and propagates trace context using the supplied TextMapPropagator.

  • Uses of Outbox in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring

    Methods in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring that return Outbox
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Outbox
    OutboxAutoConfiguration.outbox(DataSource dataSource, OutboxProperties properties, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<JdbcOutboxBuilderCustomizer> customizers)
    Creates the default Outbox bean (a JdbcOutbox) wired to the single DataSource in the context, with optional JdbcOutboxBuilderCustomizer hooks applied before JdbcOutbox.Builder.build().
